item.title: NLP · 文本表示
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<blockquote>
<p>本文参考b站视频教程学习</p>
</blockquote>
<h2 id="分词词表构建" class="heading-element"><span>分词+词表构建</span>
 <a href="#%e5%88%86%e8%af%8d%e8%af%8d%e8%a1%a8%e6%9e%84%e5%bb%ba" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="基础概念" class="heading-element"><span>基础概念</span>
 <a href="#%e5%9f%ba%e7%a1%80%e6%a6%82%e5%bf%b5" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><blockquote>
<p>流程：语料（Corpus）&mdash;&gt; 分词（Tokenization）&mdash;&gt; 词汇表（Vocabulary）</p>
</blockquote>
<ul>
<li><strong>分词</strong>是将原始文本切分为若干个具有独立意义的最小单元（token）的过程</li>
<li><strong>词表</strong>是为每个token设置 唯一确定的id，id和token之间可以双向映射</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="后续的训练预测过程" class="heading-element"><span>后续的训练/预测过程</span>
 <a href="#%e5%90%8e%e7%bb%ad%e7%9a%84%e8%ae%ad%e7%bb%83%e9%a2%84%e6%b5%8b%e8%bf%87%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>语料（Corpus）&mdash;&gt; 分词（Tokenization）&mdash;&gt; 词汇表（Vocabulary）&mdash;&gt; token的ID进入嵌入层（embedding layer），转为低维稠密的向量表示（词向量）&mdash;&gt; 隐藏层&mdash;&gt; 输出（神经元）</p>
<h2 id="分词" class="heading-element"><span>分词</span>
 <a href="#%e5%88%86%e8%af%8d" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><blockquote>
<p>对于不同的语言，由于语言结构和词边界的差异，<strong>分词策略和算法</strong>会不同</p>
</blockquote>
<h3 id="英文分词" class="heading-element"><span>英文分词</span>
 <a href="#%e8%8b%b1%e6%96%87%e5%88%86%e8%af%8d" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><blockquote>
<p>按分词粒度的大小分类分词方法</p>
</blockquote>
<ol>
<li>
<p><strong>词级分词 World Level</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>**主要思想：**最原始的分词方法，以空格标点为标志分词</li>
<li>**优点：**简单</li>
<li>**缺点：**容易出现OOV（Out-Of-Vocabulary，未登录词）问题，即文本中出现词表外的词</li>
<li>出现OOV后模型会对这些词换为统一的特殊标记（eg. &lt; UNK &gt;），从而导致语义信息的丢失，影响模型的理解和预测</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>字符级分词 Character-Level</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>**主要思想：**每一个字母、数字、标点、空格都被当做独立的token</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>**优点：**词表规模很小，覆盖率高，几乎不可能OOV</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>**缺点：**模型需要更长的上下文推断词义和结构，显著增加建模难度和成本。同时，输入序列边长，影响模型效率</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>子词级分词 Subword-Level</strong></p>
<blockquote>
<p>介于词级和字符级，英文分词最常用 eg. GPT、BERT</p>
<p>看具体效果网站：Tiktoken</p>
</blockquote>
<ul>
<li>**主要思想：**语料 -&gt; 子词 -&gt; token ，只要一个词能被拆分为词表中存在的子词单元（eg. 词根、前缀、后缀）就可以被模型识别和表示</li>
<li>**优点：**不会直接把所有的词表外的词做特殊标记</li>
<li>**常见子词分词算法：**BPE(Byte Pair Encoding)，WordPiece，Unigram Language Model
<ul>
<li>BPE：训练&ndash;把语料的词汇拆分为单个字符构建初始词表；迭代<strong>统计预料中出现频率最高</strong>的相邻字符对，将其合并为新子词单元，加入词表，持续这个过程到词表到Maxsize；分词&ndash;会对构建好的词表和合并规则对新的输入文本处理&ndash;文本拆分为最小单元，按顺序应用训练中学习到的合并规则，逐步合并到无法继续&ndash;得到分词结果。</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>
<h3 id="中文分词" class="heading-element"><span>中文分词</span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%ad%e6%96%87%e5%88%86%e8%af%8d" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ol>
<li>
<p><strong>字符级分词</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>**主要思想：**以独立的每个汉字视为独立的token</li>
<li>**特点：**因为每个汉字有独立的意思，所以比起英文，中文不易OOV</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>词级分词</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>**主要思想：**中文文本按完整词语切分，切分结果贴近人阅读</li>
<li>**特点：**没有天然词边界，一般依赖于词典、规则、模型来识别词边界</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>子词级分词</strong>（eg. Deepseek、千问）</p>
<ul>
<li>**主要思想：**类似英文，学习语料中高频的字组合，构建子词词表。</li>
<li>**特点：**无需人工词典，自适应能力强</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>
<h3 id="分词工具" class="heading-element"><span>分词工具</span>
 <a href="#%e5%88%86%e8%af%8d%e5%b7%a5%e5%85%b7" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ol>
<li>
<p><strong>中文分词工具分类：</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>基于词典或模型的传统方法：以词为单位切分（eg. jieba, HanLP）</li>
<li>基于子词建模算法（eg. BPE, Hugging Face Tokenizer, SentencePiece, tiktoken）：常用于大规模预训练语言模型</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>jieba分词器</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>**精确模式：**最精确的切开句子，适合文本分析</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-python" data-lang="python"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="nn">jieba</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;我毕业于清华大学的计算机系&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">words_generator</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">jieba</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">cut</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="c1"># 若改为lcut则是返回列表，cut是生成器</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">word</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">words_generator</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">word</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">&#39;&#39;&#39;
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">我
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">毕业
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">于
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">清华大学
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">的
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">计算机系
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">&#39;&#39;&#39;</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>**全模式：**把所有可以成词的词语扫描出来</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-python" data-lang="python"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="nn">jieba</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&#34;我毕业于清华大学的计算机系&#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">words_generator</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">jieba</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">cut</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">cut_all</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">word</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">words_generator</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">word</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">&#39;&#39;&#39;
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">我
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">毕业
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">于清华
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">清华
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">清华大学
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">华大
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">大学
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">的
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">计算
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">计算机
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">计算机系
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">算机
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">系
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">&#39;&#39;&#39;</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>**搜索引擎模式：**精确模式基础上进一步对长词切分，适用于搜索引擎分词</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>**自定义词典：**用户可以自定义词典，包含jieba词库没有的词，用于增强特定领域词汇识别</p>
<p>（每行格式：词语-词频-词标签）</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-python" data-lang="python"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="nn">jieba</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">jieba</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">load_userdict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;dict.txt&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">word_list</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">jieba</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lcut</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&#34;黄狸花猫和白狸花猫都是狸花猫的一种类型，但是彩狸花猫是相比于黄狸花猫和白狸花猫在猫界中更受猫儿的欢迎的类型，是狸花猫里的大美女&#34;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">word_list</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">&#39;&#39;&#39;
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">不加词典 [&#39;黄狸&#39;, &#39;花猫&#39;, &#39;和&#39;, &#39;白狸&#39;, &#39;花猫&#39;, &#39;都&#39;, &#39;是&#39;, &#39;狸&#39;, &#39;花猫&#39;, &#39;的&#39;, &#39;一种&#39;, &#39;类型&#39;, &#39;，&#39;, &#39;但是&#39;, &#39;彩狸&#39;, &#39;花猫&#39;, &#39;是&#39;, &#39;相比&#39;, &#39;于&#39;, &#39;黄狸&#39;, &#39;花猫&#39;, &#39;和&#39;, &#39;白狸&#39;, &#39;花猫&#39;, &#39;在&#39;, &#39;猫界&#39;, &#39;中&#39;, &#39;更&#39;, &#39;受&#39;, &#39;猫儿&#39;, &#39;的&#39;, &#39;欢迎&#39;, &#39;的&#39;, &#39;类型&#39;, &#39;，&#39;, &#39;是&#39;, &#39;狸&#39;, &#39;花猫&#39;, &#39;里&#39;, &#39;的&#39;, &#39;大美女&#39;]
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">加词典 [&#39;黄狸花猫&#39;, &#39;和&#39;, &#39;白狸花猫&#39;, &#39;都&#39;, &#39;是&#39;, &#39;狸花猫&#39;, &#39;的&#39;, &#39;一种&#39;, &#39;类型&#39;, &#39;，&#39;, &#39;但是&#39;, &#39;彩狸花猫&#39;, &#39;是&#39;, &#39;相比&#39;, &#39;于&#39;, &#39;黄狸花猫&#39;, &#39;和&#39;, &#39;白狸花猫&#39;, &#39;在&#39;, &#39;猫界&#39;, &#39;中&#39;, &#39;更&#39;, &#39;受&#39;, &#39;猫儿&#39;, &#39;的&#39;, &#39;欢迎&#39;, &#39;的&#39;, &#39;类型&#39;, &#39;，&#39;, &#39;是&#39;, &#39;狸花猫&#39;, &#39;里&#39;, &#39;的&#39;, &#39;大美女&#39;]
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="s1">&#39;&#39;&#39;</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>
<h2 id="词表示" class="heading-element"><span>词表示</span>
 <a href="#%e8%af%8d%e8%a1%a8%e7%a4%ba" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><blockquote>
<p>token =&gt; 计算机可操作的数值形式</p>
<p>发展：one-hot编码（稀疏）=&gt; 语义化词向量（稠密）</p>
</blockquote>
<h3 id="one-hot编码" class="heading-element"><span>One-hot编码</span>
 <a href="#one-hot%e7%bc%96%e7%a0%81" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>**主要思想：**词汇表中的每个词映射为一个稀疏向量（二维数组：行列数值为向量大小），向量长=词表大小，该词在对应位置为1</li>
<li>**优点：**简单直观</li>
<li>**缺点：**无法体现词和词的语义关系；并且词表越大</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="语义化向量" class="heading-element"><span>语义化向量</span>
 <a href="#%e8%af%ad%e4%b9%89%e5%8c%96%e5%90%91%e9%87%8f" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>每个词生成一个具有语义意义的稠密向量表示，让向量能够在连续空间中表达此与词之间的关系，“意思相近”的词在空间中距离更近。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260424230136991.png" alt="语义化向量" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260424230136991.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260424230136991.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260424230136991.png?size=large 2x" data-title="语义化向量" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ol>
<li>
<p><strong>Word2Vec</strong></p>
<p>一个词的含义由它周围的词决定（分布假设）</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>模型</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>CBOW（Continueous Bag-of-Words）模型</strong></p>
<blockquote>
<p>前后若干个词预测中间的目标词</p>
</blockquote>
<p>如图，前向传播过程：</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260424230247784.png" alt="CBOW" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260424230247784.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260424230247784.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260424230247784.png?size=large 2x" data-title="CBOW" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>做反向传播，更新的值为W_in绿色两行</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Skip-gram模型</strong></p>
<blockquote>
<p>从中心词预测上下文的词</p>
</blockquote>
<p>滑动窗口确定中间的词为中心词（输入），两边的词为要推理的（输出），以此训练。</p>
<p>如图，前向传播过程：</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260424230224313.png" alt="Skip-gram模型*" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260424230224313.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260424230224313.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260424230224313.png?size=large 2x" data-title="Skip-gram模型*" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<blockquote>
<p>CrossEntropy函数：多分类（一个词找到多个词）</p>
<p>SoftMax函数：转化为概率分布</p>
</blockquote>
<p>做反向传播更新的值是W_in粉色两行</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>原理</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>数据集：不用人工标注，直接可以用大规模原始文本作为数据源</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>流程：</p>
<p>语料 =&gt; 分词=&gt;one-hot编码=&gt;Skip-Gram</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Word2Vec应用</strong>（eg. Gensim&ndash;Generate Similarity）</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>公开数据集（Chinese-Word-Vectors）</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-python" data-lang="python"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kn">from</span> <span class="nn">gensim.models</span> <span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">KeyedVectors</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">model_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s1">&#39;./data/sgns.weibo.word.bz2&#39;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">model</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">KeyedVectors</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">load_word2vec_format</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">model_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">model</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">vector_size</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="c1">#看维度</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s1">&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">model</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;地铁&#39;</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="c1"># 查向量</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s1">&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"># 查相似度(两个向量的余弦值[-1,1])</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">similarity</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">model</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">similarity</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;地铁&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="s1">&#39;公交&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;地铁和公交相似度：&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="n">similarity</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s1">&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">#找与某个词最相似的词</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">similar_words</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">model</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">most_similar</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">positive</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;上班&#39;</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">topn</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">5</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">similar_words</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s1">&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>

item.title: TODO List Pre for graduated life
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)

item.title: Git指令之对项目进行相关操作
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="上传本地项目" class="heading-element"><span>上传本地项目</span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%8a%e4%bc%a0%e6%9c%ac%e5%9c%b0%e9%a1%b9%e7%9b%ae" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ol>
<li>在本地项目文件夹中初始化一个.git文件
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">git init</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div>之后就得到一个.git的隐藏文件</li>
<li>在远程仓库里面加入我要上传的仓库[相当于连接远程仓库]
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">git remote add origin https://github.com/你的github名字/仓库名.git</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>查看当前本地仓库状态
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">git status</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div>被标红色的文件就是修改的文件</li>
<li>提交本地代码到本地git的缓存区
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">git add xxx
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">git add . //全部提交</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>推送代码到本地的git库
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">git commit -m &#34;注释&#34;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>把本地的代码提交到远程仓库
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">/* 如果仓库为空 */
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">git push -u 远程主机名orign 远程分支名main/master
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">/* 如果仓库不为空 */
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">git push 远程主机名orign 远程分支名main/master</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ol>
<h2 id="其它指令" class="heading-element"><span>其它指令</span>
 <a href="#%e5%85%b6%e5%ae%83%e6%8c%87%e4%bb%a4" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">git pull // 把远程仓库同步到本地仓库=&gt;谨防覆盖自己的本地</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">git remote -v // 查看远程仓库详细信息，可以看到仓库名称，关联地址</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">git remote remove orign // 删除orign仓库（比如名称错误）</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">git remote add origin 仓库地址// 重新添加远程仓库地址</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div>
